name: Peak Design Travel Packing Cube
description: This Travel Packing Cube from Peak Design is part of a compartment system that enhances the ability to organize the contents of a Peak Design Travel-series bag.

features.Key Features:: Compressible Travel Organizer | 70D Ripstop Nylon/Poly Outer Shell | Unique Tear-Away Zipper | Adjustable Internal Divider | Expandable Compartments | For Peak Design Travel Bags | Removable Clothes Compartment | Partition for Clean and Dirty Clothes | Versatile, Space-Efficient | Expandable from 4.5L to 9L | Fast-Open Pull Tabs | Weather Resistant
features.What’s in the box?: Peak Design Packing Cube | Limited Lifetime Warranty | Peak Design Travel Packing Cube | Limited Lifetime Manufacturer Warranty
